title: 2-to-4 Line Decoder Operation
description: A logic diagram showing how a basic decoder circuit converts binary inputs into mutually exclusive active-high outputs.
relationships: Inputs A and B are fed directly to some AND gates and through inverters to others
Each AND gate combines specific input conditions (A, B, A', B') to activate its corresponding output
Only one output (Y0-Y3) is active (high) for any given 2-bit input combination
